prompt:
Extract the contact info from this text and return as JSON with keys: name, email, phone, company.

Reach out to Jane Smith at jane.smith@acme.co or call 555-0142. She's the VP of Engineering at Acme Corp.

From this org description, identify the key decision maker role for a SaaS purchase: CTO, CFO, VP Engineering, or Engineering Manager.

The company has a flat engineering org where the VP of Engineering owns all tooling budgets and vendor relationships.

Summarize this company for a sales brief. Include: industry, size, and key technology stack.

TechFlow is a 200-person fintech startup building real-time payment processing. They use Go, PostgreSQL, and Kubernetes on AWS.
